name: meta-rl-agentic-search
description: Adaptive search strategies that learn from experience. Perfect for information retrieval, document exploration, knowledge base navigation, research workflows, multi-step question answering, dynamic query refinement, and self-improving search agents. Triggers: 'optimize search', 'learn search patterns', 'adaptive retrieval', 'search strategy', 'meta-learning search'.
paperTitle: Meta-RL Agentic Search: Adaptive Information Discovery Through Self-Reflection
